title: Deployment Readiness Protocol
description: Deterministic criteria for validating operational readiness before release. Prevents unsafe deployments and enforces governance integrity.

rules.condition: active milestone status is not in_progress or prerequisite milestones incomplete
rules.description: Active milestone must be in_progress and all prerequisite milestones must be completed.
No tickets may be in blocked state.

rules.condition: runtime state files reference different active milestone, ticket, or phase
rules.description: All runtime state files must reference the same active milestone, ticket, and phase.

rules.condition: dependency graph contains cycle or missing active milestone/ticket
rules.description: Dependency graph must be acyclic and contain the active milestone and ticket.

rules.condition: checkpoint directory or latest-checkpoint.json missing or invalid
rules.description: Checkpoint directory and latest-checkpoint.json must exist and be valid.

rules.condition: execution lock not acquired or expired
rules.description: Execution lock must be acquired and not expired.
No uncommitted governance file changes may exist.

rules.condition: any runtime state file is invalid JSON
rules.description: All runtime state files must be valid JSON.

invariants.description: Deployment readiness requires all checks to pass.
Any deployment bypass must leave an audit trail.
